summary: Verified forgot-password modal flow on /auth after E1's fix (rendering <ForgotPasswordModal /> in Auth.jsx return tree). All 4 modal sub-flows pass: (1) link click opens modal, (2) submit with admin@leaguepro.com renders forgot-sent success screen within ~1s, (3) close-btn dismisses modal, (4) backdrop click dismisses modal. Regression: admin login -> /dashboard still works and shows 'Email notifications: ON' pill, confirming iteration_3 functionality intact.
critical_code_review_comments: ForgotPasswordModal.jsx: email state is initialized from prefillEmail only on first mount; if the user opens modal, changes auth email input, closes and reopens, the modal still shows the original email. Minor UX nit — handleClose resets to prefillEmail so works most of the time. Could use a useEffect on [open, prefillEmail] to keep it in sync. Not blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 confirmed ForgotPasswordModal bug fix. Modal now renders in Auth.jsx (lines 253-257). All data-testids (forgot-password-link, forgot-password-modal, forgot-email-input, forgot-submit-btn, forgot-sent, forgot-close-btn) work as designed. Backdrop click also dismisses correctly via onClick on the outer wrapper with e.stopPropagation on inner card. Admin login regression passes.
rca of the issue: Previous iteration RCA: modal component was imported but never rendered in JSX. Fix: added just before closing root in Auth.jsx. Verified working.
